title: Wang Tian Shui
content:
Wang Tian Shui
 is 
Wang Lin
's father and the child of a concubine in the 
Wang Clan
.

Contents

1

2

History

3

Links and References

Background
[
]

He was born as the child of a concubine and eventually his brothers, except for 
Fourth Uncle
, conspired against him to steal his portion of the inheritance. After this, he set up a shop in town and became a carpenter.

History
[
]

Book One
[
]

When 
Fourth Uncle
 offered 
Wang Lin
 a chance to join the 
Heng Yue Sect
, he and his wife threw a party to celebrate. This tragically set up Wang Lin's deep sense of failure when he was not accepted and caused him to leave home. After this, Wang Tian Shui and Fourth Uncle forced 
Wang Tian Shan
 to ask the sect for help finding Wang Lin. They were quite happy when he got into the sect thanks to Fourth Uncle's bribes.

Book Two
[
]

With the help of Fourth Uncle, Wang Tian Shui manages to regain his inheritance. He also takes on a few apprentices including Wang Lin's childhood playmate 
Little Six
. He is later slaughtered, alongside the entire Wang Clan, by 
Teng Huayuan
 in retaliation for Wang Lin killing his great grandson. His soul was sealed into a soul flag and used as a weapon against Wang Lin. However, Wang Lin managed to retrieve his parents souls.

Book Four
[
]

Finally accepting the reality that his parents are just mortals and allows their souls to enter the cycle of reincarnation.
